'''âk-ng-p-th''' ('''kakangpethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jarble|jarble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jarble|jarble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-ng-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kakangpethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikangpethoko|thikangpethoko]] || [[word:jikangpethoko|jikangpethoko]] || [[word:shikangpethoko|shikangpethoko]] || [[word:kikangpethoko|kikangpethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
